name: Eiffel Tower
description: A famous 19th-century wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars, standing 330 meters tall.

name: Louvre Museum
description: The world's largest art museum and a historic monument in Paris.

name: Arc de Triomphe
description: One of the most famous monuments in Paris, standing at the western end of the Champs-Élysées.

name: Big Ben
description: The iconic clock tower at the north end of the Palace of Westminster in London.

name: Tower Bridge
description: A combined bascule and suspension bridge in London over the River Thames.

name: Statue of Liberty
description: A colossal neoclassical copper sculpture on Liberty Island in New York Harbor.

name: Golden Gate Bridge
description: An internationally recognized suspension bridge spanning the Golden Gate.

name: Tokyo Tower
description: A red-and-white communications and observation tower in Tokyo.

name: Sydney Opera House
description: A multi-venue performing arts centre in Sydney, Australia.

name: Colosseum
description: A breathtaking oval amphitheatre in the heart of Rome.
